extraction.one_line_summary: LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel attacked with CONTADOR on final climb to Monachil, dropped him 6km from finish for solo stage win at 2500m altitude.
tactical_patterns: LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel's tandem attack with CONTADOR neutralized NIBALI's earlier move while using teammate protection through breakaway presence.
ZAKARIN outsprinted favorites group 13km from finish showing podium ambition trumps domestique role when leaders falter at extreme altitude.
Astana controlled early break to 3-minute max despite 17 escapees, suggesting calculation that altitude finish negates large time gaps.

rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: Third stage win demonstrating superior high-altitude climbing at 2000m+, consistently able to drop GC rivals in final 6km.
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: positive: Attacked favorites group 13km out and took second place, revealing podium ambitions override team tactics.
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: Dropped by LÓPEZ 6km from finish and struggled badly on final kilometers, podium hopes now extinguished.
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: Gained six more seconds on NIBALI despite not winning stage, demonstrating consistent strength management.
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: Lost six seconds to FROOME and failed when attacking 13km out, losing ground in two-man GC battle.
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: neutral: Finished third but lost podium position to ZAKARIN, suggesting altitude resilience without acceleration capacity.
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Gained ground on final ascent before leaders attacked, showing improved form after earlier difficulties.
